ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu the item is part of */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the menu item */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens in the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the menu item */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is currently visible on the menu */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is a special offer or limited-time offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the territory is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the territory */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the territory */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the territory */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territory */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) spoken in the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu */,
  "menu_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory the menu is available in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the menu availability */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the menu availability */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu is currently active */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the menu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item the price is for */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory the price is valid in */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the price is currently in effect */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the price is part of a promotion */,
  "promotion_details" TEXT /* Details of the promotion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item sold */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory the sale occurred in */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item sold */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount in the local currency */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., regular, loyalty member) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order ID */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sale is a return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., corporate, regional manager, store manager) */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
